title: Custom Shopify Sections System
shortDescription: Reusable, editable Shopify sections designed to extend a theme without locking the merchant into fixed layouts.
overview: This work demonstrates a modular approach to Shopify theme development.
Each section is designed with merchant-editable settings, responsive behavior, and reusable content blocks.
problem: Default theme sections could not support the required brand presentation or content flexibility.
solution: I created custom Liquid sections with structured schema settings, responsive layouts, and visual behaviors that could be managed in the Shopify Theme Editor.
results: A consistent visual system across pages
